summary: Product Detail page redesign testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 27 frontend UI tests passed. The redesigned Product Detail page includes all requested features: social share buttons, product tags, key features section, applications section, formal specs table with dark header, quote form modal overlay, help banner, and 'You May Also Like' related products section.
passed_tests: GET /api/products/{id} returns full product data with all required fields
POST /api/leads with valid data creates lead with Hot score
POST /api/leads with minimal data creates lead
POST /api/leads without name returns 422 validation error
POST /api/leads without phone returns 422 validation error
frontend_tests_passed: Product Detail page loads at /products/{id}
Breadcrumb navigation: Home > Products > Division > Product Name - all links clickable
Back to Products link visible with 'All Products' text
Hero section: Product image on left (sticky)
Product tags below image (3 clickable chips: Trauma, Plating Systems, Titanium)
Social share buttons: WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Email, Copy Link visible
Copy Link share button copies URL to clipboard
Product title displays correctly: ARMAR Titanium Plating System
SKU code displays: MRL-TRMA-002
Product description displays correctly
Quick attribute chips: Material (Titanium), Manufacturer (Meril Life Sciences)
Key Features card shows 3 technical specs with green checkmarks
CTA buttons: Request Bulk Quote and WhatsApp Enquiry visible and aligned
Secondary CTAs: Call Sales Team and Request Datasheet visible
Trust badges: ISO 13485, CE Mark, CDSCO Approved, Authorized Distributor with sub-labels
Quote form modal opens on clicking Request Bulk Quote
Quote form modal: dark header shows product name
Quote form validation: requires Name and WhatsApp Number
Quote form submission with valid data creates lead via API
Quote form Cancel button closes the modal
Clicking modal overlay background closes the modal
Overview tab shows: Product Description, Key Features (2-col grid), Applications, Product Details grid
Specifications tab shows formal table with dark ATTRIBUTE/DETAIL header (rgb(11, 31, 63)) and zebra striping (9 rows)
Sizes & Variants tab disabled for products without sizes
Help banner: dark navy banner with 'Need Technical Assistance?' text and Call Now / Contact Specialist buttons
Related Products (You May Also Like) section shows 4 products from same division
Related product cards navigate to correct product detail page
Mobile responsive: page stacks properly on mobile viewport (390x844)
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx is well-structured with sub-components (ProductTags, ShareButtons, TrustBadge, RelatedCard)
Quote form modal correctly uses overlay click handler to close modal
Specs table correctly merges product meta + technical_specifications into formal table
Related products correctly filtered to exclude current product and limited to 4
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Mobile responsive design uses proper grid breakpoints (lg:grid-cols-12)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing were cleaned up

context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Detail page redesign fully functional. All features from Agile Ortho reference implemented: social share, product tags, key features, applications, formal specs table, quote modal, help banner, related products.
